body.title: Add feed type field to PgBus envelopes; enforce 1K debug cap
body.result: Bus test suite: 27/27 pass. Debug cap verified with 1000-msg eviction test. feed_type column in mailboxes, Envelope roundtrip clean. Commit b2618a00.
body.intention: I intend that every bus envelope carries a feed type (public/personal/debug) and that debug feed mailboxes are capped at 1000 messages, evicting oldest on write.
body.description:
Implement the bus-layer foundation for the feeds taxonomy (D-feeds-taxonomy-2026-06-11). Add `feed_type` field to Envelope dataclass (default: 'personal'). Add `debug_cap` enforcement to PgBus.append(): when the destination mailbox has feed_type=debug and message count >= 1000, delete the oldest message before inserting. Store feed_type in bus.messages and bus.mailboxes tables.

**Affected files:** bus/envelope.py, bus/pg_bus.py (append + schema), possibly a migration for bus.mailboxes.feed_type column
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; Postgres only
**Scope boundary:** IN: feed_type on Envelope, 1K cap on debug mailboxes, schema changes. OUT: notification logic, importance flag, web UI, device changes.
**Completion criteria:** (1) Envelope has feed_type: str = 'personal'; (2) PgBus.create_mailbox() accepts feed_type kwarg stored in bus.mailboxes; (3) PgBus.append() enforces 1000-message cap for debug mailboxes; (4) existing bus tests pass; (5) new tests: debug mailbox evicts oldest when cap hit, personal/public unaffected.
